name: Country-Style Cole Slaw
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, stir together the mayonnaise, sugar, cider vinegar, salt, dry mustard, and celery seeds until well combined.
2. Add the remaining ingredients (coarsely shredded cabbage, coarsely shredded carrots, diced green peppers, and sliced green onions) to the bowl.
3. Toss everything together until all ingredients are evenly coated.
4. Cover the bowl with plastic wrap.
5. Chill in the refrigerator for at least 2 hours before serving.
Makes 4 cups.
